title: Proclamation No. 528, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 528

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF MABATOBATO, MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF KIANGAN, SUBPROVINCE OF IFUGAO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Mabatobato, municipal district of Kiangan, subprovince of Ifugao, Mountain Province, island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psu-105269, to wit:

A parcel of land (Plan Psu-105269, G. L. R. 0. Record No.       ), situated in the barrio of Mabatobato, municipal district of Kiangan, Mountain Province, (subprovine of Ifugao). Bounded on the NE. and SE. by public land; on the SW. by property of Macario Garcia (H-1517S8) ; and on the NW, by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 81″ 56′ W., 3,505.50 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 2, Barrio of Lamut, Mp. of Bagabag, thence N 66° 26′ W. 180.24 m. to point “2” thence N. 47° 35′ E., 231.53 m. to point “3” thence N. 77° 58′ E. 78.91 m. to point “4”; thence S. 37° 16′ E. 176.02 m. to point “5”; thence S. 35″ 22′ W., 161.77 m. to point “6”; thence N. 74° 07’ W. 99.67 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of fifty-four thousand two hundred seventy-six square meters (54,276), more or less. All points referred to are all indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “2” are marked by old B. L. concrete monuments 15 x 60 cm.; to point “3” by bulala tree 30 cm. diam.; point “4” by bulala tree 25 cm. diam.; point “5” by stone monument marked P. L. S. 15 cm. diam.; and point “6” by nail on X on big stump post 30 cm. diam.; bearings true; declination 0° 22; E.; date of the original survey, May 17, 1938, and that of the approval, September 20, 1938.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twelfth day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

(Sgd.) MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
